project_context.aesthetic: Luxurious, premium, mysterious, deeply personal but highly modern and dynamic
project_context.core_colors: Deep Black base with vibrant Cyan accents

headings.usage_rules: Use for all major section titles, diary entry titles, and hero text. Apply tight tracking (tracking-tight) to H1-H2. This font establishes the premium, classic journal aesthetic.

body_and_ui.usage_rules: Use for paragraphs, dashboard metrics, buttons, inputs, and meta text (dates, tags, moods). Maintains modern SaaS legibility on dark backgrounds.

gradients.primary_text: bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-white to-[#00E5FF]/80 bg-clip-text text-transparent

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-white/5 or border-[#00E5FF]/20 for active/premium cards.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient glows rather than harsh drop shadows. Example: shadow-[0_4px_30px_rgba(0,229,255,0.05)]
visual_enhancers.textures: Apply a subtle noise overlay (opacity 2-3%) on the main background to prevent digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use on sticky headers, floating menus, and dropdowns. NEVER use fully transparent backgrounds. Always use backdrop blur combined with a semi-solid color.

layouts_and_grids.general: Generous spacing philosophy. Use p-8 or p-12 for containers. Avoid cramped content.
layouts_and_grids.dashboard_grid: Use a dense, high-contrast grid for the dashboard (e.g., grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6). Prioritize the F-pattern (North Star Metric top-left).
layouts_and_grids.diary_feed: Use a masonry or staggered grid for diary entries so they feel organic, personal, and artistic.

diary_cards.style: bg-[#0B0E14] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 overflow-hidden relative group flex flex-col gap-4
diary_cards.content: Line-clamp for body text, prominent elegant date typography (Playfair Display).

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:bg-[#33EEFF] transition-colors shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.3)] hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-[#00E5FF]/50 transition-all
buttons.icon_buttons: rounded-full p-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/5 hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/20 hover:text-[#00E5FF] hover:border-[#00E5FF]/30 transition-all

inputs.style: bg-[#131822] border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-neutral-600

motion_and_animations.moving_diaries_concept: For the landing page or empty dashboard state, implement an infinite scrolling or gently floating parallax array of abstract diary cards using framer-motion (e.g., animate={{ y: [0, -10, 0] }}).
motion_and_animations.card_entrance: Staggered fade-up for the diary feed. initial={opacity: 0, y: 30}, animate={opacity: 1, y: 0}, transition={staggerChildren: 0.1, duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut'}.
motion_and_animations.hover_effects: Fluid micro-interactions on all interactive elements. Cards lift, borders glow cyan.
motion_and_animations.page_transitions: Smooth fade out and in across routes using AnimatePresence.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over cyan backgrounds uses black (#000000) for APCA readability.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a high-contrast focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#030508]).
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion in Framer Motion configurations.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements, forms, and cards MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-entry-btn').

media_and_images.aesthetic: Dark, moody, abstract liquid cyans or premium notebooks to convey high-end luxury.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Use React (.js / .jsx) extensions exclusively. Do NOT use TypeScript (.tsx).
Never use pure black without texturing; base background should be #030508.
Do NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for overlays, dialogs, or dropdowns. Always use glassmorphism (bg-[#0B0E14]/80 backdrop-blur-xl).
Avoid generic centered layouts. Prioritize Grid/Bento layouts for dashboards.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Install 'framer-motion' for the 'moving diaries' floating animation and staggered card entrances.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., 'Entry saved successfully', 'Image uploaded').
Do NOT use the generic 'inter' font for headings; strictly use 'Playfair Display' for the luxury journal vibe.
NEVER use generic placeholder image URLs; use the provided Unsplash URLs.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to every form input, submit button, and diary card for robust automated testing.
instructions_to_main_agent: Create a fully functional, React (.js) + Tailwind based dashboard application. Implement standard Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them to match the Black + Cyan theme. Build an animated hero/dashboard empty state featuring floating 'diary cards' using Framer Motion to satisfy the 'moving diaries' requirement. Use layered elevation with subtle borders (border-white/5) to separate cards, avoiding aggressive drop shadows in dark mode. Include full CRUD flows for diary entries, image attachments, and a mood tracker widget. Follow F-Pattern layout principles for the dashboard interface.
